mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, content, type, description, variables, is_active, version, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_template ORDER BY is_active DESC, updated_at DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, code, content, type, description, variables, is_active, version, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_template WHERE type = #{type} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, code, content, type, description, variables, is_active, version, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_template WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, code, content, type, description, variables, is_active, version, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_template WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
